text: pani kal se nahi aa raha ghar me
road bahut jyada tuti hui hai bike chalana mushkil
street light 3 din se band hai pura area andhera
kuda kachra har jagah pada hai koi safai nahi
naali block ho gayi badbu aa rahi hai
water pressure bahut low hai upar tak nahi aa raha
gadde itne bade hai ki car ka tyre damage ho gaya
raat ko light nahi hoti chori ka darr lagta hai
dustbin overflow ho raha aur machhar badh rahe
sewer ka pani road par aa raha hai
no water supply since yesterday morning
broken road near bus stop causing traffic
lights not working in our lane from last week
garbage collection vehicle not coming regularly
drain water stuck and mosquitoes increasing
tap se brown color ka pani aa raha
road repair ka kaam aadha chhod diya
pole light blink kar rahi hai continuously
public area me bahut gandagi hai
manhole khula hai accident ho sakta hai
